name: Burgundy Meat Ball Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, breadcrumbs, onion, egg, salt, pepper, thyme. Shape into 1½-inch meatballs.
2. Heat butter and oil in a skillet. Brown the meatballs lightly on all sides. Drain excess fat.
3. Combine the meatballs with the remaining ingredients in a Dutch oven. (This can be refrigerated at this point.) Cover and bake for about 45 minutes at 350°F, or until the vegetables are tender. During the last 15 minutes, thicken with cornstarch or flour.
